name: Not Reciving logs from main Server
conditions_text: when the event(s) have not been detected by one or more of WinCollect @ VM-DMS-Live, WinCollect @ H360-DC2, WinCollect @ H360-DC3, WinCollect @ H360-TALLY, WinCollect @ SRV-APP-H360, WinCollect @ H360FS for 900 seconds
TD_list: APPLY Not Reciving logs from main Server on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
